title: dendranthema chalchingolicum
intro: Dendranthema chalchingolicum, also known as Chalchihuitlicue's asters, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Dendranthema chalchingolicum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Dendranthema chalchingolicum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
